title: Herbalshire Menthol Crystals 30g – Natural Decongestant for Inhalation, Sinus & Steam Relief | Pure Eucalyptus Vapour Crystals – Clears Blocked Nose, Cold Relief, Soothes Breathing
features: 100% PURE MENTHOL – Steam-distilled from peppermint oil for powerful natural decongestant relief.
CLEAR BLOCKED NOSES FAST – Ideal for sinusitis, cold symptoms, and allergies – inhale or add to vapour devices.
MULTI-USE CRYSTALS – Perfect for steam inhalation, humidifiers, saunas, oil burners, and bath soaks.
SOOTHING VAPOUR RELIEF – Quickly opens airways, eases breathing, and reduces congestion naturally.
TRAVEL & HOME FRIENDLY – 30g resealable jar – perfect size for on-the-go sinus rescue or daily wellness use.
MULTIFUNCTIONAL USES: Add to baths, saunas, or steam rooms to enjoy invigorating relief and relaxation, promoting comfort and wellness at home or in spa settings.
HAND-PACKED IN THE UK – From a trusted British herbal brand specialising in natural remedies.
NO ADDITIVES OR FILLERS – Just pure menthol – vegan, cruelty-free, and naturally effective.
description: Product Description Menthol Crystal’s for inhalation, a natural decongestant. - Immediate Relief: Menthol crystals for inhalation provide immediate relief from congestion and discomfort associated with respiratory issues such as colds, allergies, and sinusitis. The soothing cooling effect of menthol helps to open up airways and ease breathing. - High Quality: Our menthol crystals are made from pure peppermint oil, ensuring high quality and effectiveness. They are carefully processed to retain the maximum amount of menthol for optimal relief. - Versatile Use: These menthol crystals can be used in a variety of ways for respiratory relief. They can be dissolved in hot water for inhalation, added to vaporizers or humidifiers, or used in steam showers. They can also be used topically by adding a few drops to a carrier oil and massaging onto the chest or back. - Convenient Packaging: Our menthol crystals come in a resealable bag, making it easy to store and use as needed. The bag is also designed to keep the crystals fresh and potent for longer periods of time. - Natural and Safe: Our menthol crystals are made from natural peppermint oil and are free from artificial additives and preservatives. They are safe for use by adults and children over 2 years old. However, it is important to read and follow the instructions and consult a healthcare professional if you have any underlying medical conditions. Soothing Respiratory Relief Soothing Respiratory Relief: Menthol crystals for inhalation can provide immediate relief from congestion and discomfort associated with respiratory issues such as colds, allergies, and sinusitis. The cooling effect of menthol helps to open up airways, making it easier to breathe deeply. Versatile Use Versatile Use: Apart from inhalation, these menthol crystals have various applications. They can be added to hot water for steam inhalation or dissolved in carrier oils for massage therapy. Their potent cooling properties make them an ideal ingredient in homemade balms, creams, and lotions for soothing muscle aches and pains. Menthol Crystals Menthol Crystals: Natural Respiratory Relief: Our menthol crystals are derived from pure peppermint oil, offering a natural solution for soothing respiratory discomfort. When dissolved in hot water and inhaled as steam, the menthol vapours help to open up nasal passages, relieve congestion, and promote easier breathing. Natural Vaporizer Natural Vaporizer: Our menthol crystals are derived from pure peppermint oil, ensuring an all-natural and aromatic experience. Simply add a few crystals to your vaporizer or diffuser for a refreshing and invigorating aroma that can help clear your nasal passages and promote relaxation.

specifications_table.Serving Recommendation: ‎Add to hot water for steam inhalation
